headline: Is Modine's HVAC Business Set for a Turnaround in 2027?
summary: MOD sees its HVAC Technologies segment improving in fiscal 2027 as acquired businesses contribute and Commercial HVAC sales rise 5-10%.

headline: 5 High-Flying Tech Services Stocks to Buy for Solid Returns in 2H 2026
